section.title: Childhood Obesity Vocabulary
section.summary: Health and nutrition related vocabulary, focusing on childhood obesity topics such as 'breakneck', 'nutritious', 'to solve', and 'vending machine'.

questions.prompt: What is the French translation of 'childhood'?
questions.explanation: According to the source, 'childhood' translates to 'enfance'.
